debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
x : ℝ
hxge : x ≥ ↑n
hxlt : x < ↑n + 1
⊢ ↑(∏ k ∈ Icc 1 (primeCountingReal x), nth Nat.Prime k / (nth Nat.Prime k - 1)) ≤
    ↑(∏ k ∈ Icc 1 (primeCountingReal x), (k + 1) / k)

failed_attempts:
simp only [mem_Icc] at hk
        have h1 : 1 ≤ k := hk.1
        have hpk : (nth Nat.Prime k).Prime := nth_prime k
        have hpk2 : nth Nat.Prime k ≥ 2 := hpk.two_le
        have hpk_ge : nth Nat.Prime k ≥ k + 1 := Prime.nth_prime_add_one_le k
        have denom_pos : (nth Nat.Prime k : ℝ) - 1 > 0 := by linarith [hpk2]
        have k_pos : (k : ℝ) > 0 := by linarith
        rw [div_le_div_iff denom_pos k_pos]
        have : (nth Nat.Prime k : ℝ) ≥ k + 1 := by exact_mod_cast hpk_ge
        nlinarith

simp only [Finset.mem_Icc] at hk
        have h1 : 1 ≤ k := hk.1
        have hp : (nth Nat.Prime k).Prime := Nat.Prime.nth_prime k
        have hge : nth Nat.Prime k ≥ k + 1 := by
          exact Nat.Prime.nth_prime_add_one_le k
        have hpos : 0 < nth Nat.Prime k - 1 := by omega
        have hpos' : 0 < k := by omega
        rw [div_le_div_iff (by positivity) (by positivity)]
        calc (nth Nat.Prime k) * k ≤ (nth Nat.Prime k) * (nth Nat.Prime k - 1) := by nlinarith
          _ ≤ (k + 1) * (nth Nat.Prime k - 1) := by nlinarith
exact Nat.cast_le.mpr (Finset.prod_le_prod (fun k _ => Nat.zero_le _) (fun k hk => by simp only [Nat.div_le_div_iff]; sorry))

gcongr with k hk
        have hp : Nat.Prime (nth Nat.Prime k) := Nat.prime_nth_prime k
        have hpk : nth Nat.Prime k ≥ k + 1 := Nat.nth_prime_add_one_le k
        have h1 : (1 : ℕ) ≤ k := (Finset.mem_Icc.mp hk).1
        have hpos : 0 < nth Nat.Prime k - 1 := by omega_nat
        have hkpos : 0 < k := by omega
        rw [div_le_div_iff] <;> [skip; positivity; positivity]
        calc nth Nat.Prime k * k 
            ≤ nth Nat.Prime k * (nth Nat.Prime k - 1) := by nlinarith
            _ = (nth Nat.Prime k - 1) * nth Nat.Prime k := by ring
            _ ≤ (k + 1) * (nth Nat.Prime k - 1) := by nlinarith
